title: 用 pause_turn 处理长时间运行的服务器工具
title_en: Handling Long-Running Server Tools with pause_turn

body.problem: 使用 web_search 等服务器工具时，API 可能返回 stop_reason 为 `pause_turn`，表示一个长时间运行的 turn 被暂停了。如果你只检查 `end_turn` 和 `tool_use`，就会丢失未完成的响应。
body.solution: 在消息循环中增加对 `pause_turn` 的处理：收到 `pause_turn` 时，将当前 assistant message 原样追加到 messages 数组，再发起一次 API 调用让 Claude 继续。这类似于客户端工具的 tool_use 循环，但你不需要提供任何 tool_result——只需让对话继续即可。
body.keyTakeaway: 消息循环必须处理三种 stop_reason：`end_turn`（结束）、`tool_use`（客户端工具需要执行）、`pause_turn`（服务器工具暂停，原样续传）。

body_en.problem: When using server tools like web_search, the API may return a `pause_turn` stop reason, meaning a long-running turn has been paused. If your message loop only checks for `end_turn` and `tool_use`, you'll drop the unfinished response.
body_en.solution: Add `pause_turn` handling to your message loop: when you receive it, append the current assistant message as-is to your messages array and make another API call so Claude can continue. It's similar to the client tool_use loop, but you don't supply any tool_result—just let the conversation resume.
body_en.keyTakeaway: Your message loop must handle three stop reasons: `end_turn` (done), `tool_use` (client tool needs execution), and `pause_turn` (server tool paused—re-send as-is to continue).
